## What changed and why

## Checklist

- [ ] Title and commits are Conventional Commits (`type(scope): summary`).
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest -q`), and new behaviour has a test.
- [ ] Markdown passes the de-slop lint (`deslopper lint`).
- [ ] A new tell or preset updates the fixtures and the golden files.
